name: wakewait
description: Independent auto sleep and long waits for agent CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: Independent auto sleep and long waits for agent CLIs.
interface.longDescription: WakeWait adds an independent local CLI plus Codex skills for timed sleep, condition polling, persisted wait state, status/cancel commands, health reviews, and optional background recovery for long-running jobs.
defaultPrompt: Install WakeWait v1 and verify the wakewait CLI works.
Use WakeWait for a long training job with the standalone CLI.
Check and cancel persisted WakeWait tasks.
